# User:  Hello! I'm looking for a guesthouse in Cambridge that has a 4-star rating, offers free Wi-Fi, and includes free parking. Could you help me find one?
# System: "Could you please specify if you want the guesthouse in a specific area within Cambridge such as north, west, south, east, or centre? If you prefer, I can search in all areas of Cambridge."
# User:  I would prefer to search in all areas of Cambridge to have more options,
# System: "I found several 4-star guesthouses in Cambridge with free Wi-Fi and free parking across various areas. Here are some options:\n1. Acorn Guest House - North, 154 Chesterton Road, Double room £75\n2. Alexander Bed and Breakfast - Centre, 56 Saint Barnabas Road, Double room £50\n3. Allenbell - East, 517a Coldham Lane, Double room £60\n4. Arbury Lodge Guesthouse - North, 82 Arbury Road, Double room £75\n5. Archway House - North, 52 Gilbert Road, Double room £70\n6. Autumn House - East, 710 Newmarket Road, Double room £60\n7. Aylesbray Lodge Guest House - South, 5 Mowbray Road, Double room £75\nPlease let me know if you want to book any of these or if you need more information about any guesthouse."
# User:  Can you provide more details about the Acorn Guest House, like the room types available and amenities? I want to make sure it can accommodate 6 people for 3 nights.
# System: "The Acorn Guest House in the north area of Cambridge has the following room types and prices: double room for £75, family room for £105, and single room for £50. It offers free Wi-Fi and free parking. Would you like to book it for 6 people for 3 nights, or do you need information on any other amenities?"
# User:  That sounds good. Please book the Acorn Guest House for 6 people for 3 nights starting from Thursday.
# System: "The Acorn Guest House has been successfully booked for 6 people for 3 nights starting from Thursday. Your reference number is vuYrDitk. Is there anything else I can help you with?"

Please let me know which departure time you'd like to book, and I'll handle it immediately."

# System: "I’m really sorry for the inconvenience and understand your frustration. To resolve this quickly, please let me know your preferred departure time from the available options: 05:01, 06:01, 07:01, 08:01, 09:01, 10:01, or 11:01. I will book it for you right away."
